findings.title: WEAK randomness (predictable on-chain RNG in an outcome path)
findings.note: predictable on-chain RNG: keccak256 over block entropy (timestamp/blockhash/difficulty/coinbase) drives an outcome -> grindable (predict-and-revert; use commit-reveal or Chainlink VRF)

findings.title: abi.encodePacked HASH-COLLISION (dynamic args)
findings.note: abi.encodePacked(2+ args) in a hash -> verify no two ADJACENT dynamic (string/bytes/array) args (hash collision); use abi.encode if so
